holidays.name: New Year's Day
holidays.local_name: နှစ်သစ်ကူးနေ့
holidays.description: The first day of the Gregorian calendar.

holidays.name: Independence Day
holidays.local_name: လွတ်လပ်ရေးနေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the 75th anniversary of independence from British rule in 1948.

holidays.name: Union Day
holidays.local_name: ပြည်ထောင်စုနေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the signing of the Panglong Agreement in 1947.

holidays.name: Peasants' Day
holidays.local_name: တောင်သူလယ်သမားနေ့
holidays.description: Honors the contribution of farmers and agriculture to the nation.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Tabaung
holidays.local_name: တပေါင်းလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Buddhist festival marking the end of the cool season and the completion of Shwedagon Pagoda.

holidays.name: Armed Forces Day
holidays.local_name: တပ်မတော်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the resistance against Japanese occupation in 1945.

holidays.name: Thingyan Eve
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကြိုနေ့
holidays.description: First day of the Water Festival.

holidays.name: Thingyan Akya Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကျနေ့
holidays.description: Second day of the Water Festival.

holidays.name: Thingyan Akat Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အကြတ်နေ့
holidays.description: Third day of the Water Festival.

holidays.name: Thingyan Atat Day
holidays.local_name: သင်္ကြန်အတက်နေ့
holidays.description: Final day of the Water Festival.

holidays.name: Myanmar New Year
holidays.local_name: နှစ်ဆန်းတစ်ရက်နေ့
holidays.description: The first day of the Myanmar calendar.

holidays.name: Labour Day
holidays.local_name: အလုပ်သမားနေ့
holidays.description: International Workers' Day.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Kason
holidays.local_name: ကဆုန်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Buddha Day celebrating birth, enlightenment, and death.

holidays.name: Martyrs' Day
holidays.local_name: အာဇာနည်နေ့
holidays.description: Commemorates the assassination of General Aung San.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Waso
holidays.local_name: ဝါဆိုလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Beginning of the three-month Buddhist Lent.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Thadingyut Holiday
holidays.local_name: သီတင်းကျွတ်အကြိုနေ့
holidays.description: Day before the Thadingyut Full Moon.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Thadingyut
holidays.local_name: သီတင်းကျွတ်လပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: End of Buddhist Lent - Light Festival.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Thadingyut Holiday
holidays.local_name: သီတင်းကျွတ်အလွန်နေ့
holidays.description: Day after the Thadingyut Full Moon.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Tazaungdaing Holiday
holidays.local_name: တန်ဆောင်မုန်းအကြိုနေ့
holidays.description: Day before Tazaungdaing Full Moon.

holidays.name: Full Moon of Tazaungdaing
holidays.local_name: တန်ဆောင်မုန်းလပြည့်နေ့
holidays.description: Festival of Lights and robe-weaving (Matho Thingan).

holidays.name: National Day
holidays.description: Anniversary of the 1920 university student strike.

holidays.name: Christmas Day
holidays.local_name: ခရစ္စမတ်နေ့
holidays.description: Birthday of Jesus Christ.
